name: prettier-check-can-block-verify
hook: Prettier --check is part of the verify gate; pre-existing format drift on the branch can fail the gate for unrelated work
body: The verify gate runs `pnpm format:check` as one of its checks. If a branch has pre-existing prettier drift (verified by `git stash` + `pnpm format:check`), the gate will fail for an unrelated fix. Fix the drift with `pnpm prettier --write <files>` so the gate can ratify the actual change. The drift fix lands in the same PR — this is acceptable scope because no behavior changes.
why: Verify gate is a black box; it doesn't know whether failures are pre-existing. A red gate blocks DONE declaration regardless of cause, so pre-existing format drift must be cleared before the gate can ratify the real fix.
